# WaterTurbine Documentation

This folder contains detailed reference documentation for the firmware. For a project overview, see the [root README](../README.md).

## Project Summary

**Platform:** ESP32-P4
**Display:** 1024x600 LCD (EK79007) with GT911 capacitive touch
**UI:** LVGL 9.2.2, generated by SquareLine Studio 1.6.0
**Purpose:** Real-time water turbine parameter monitoring dashboard

**Current state:** All four UI screens (Main Menu, Gauges, Data, Settings) are functional. Voltage and Ampere are read from an INA219 current/power monitor over I2C with 2-point linear calibration. Power is computed from Voltage x Ampere. Flow Rate is read from a YF-DN50 sensor and RPM from a hall sensor, both via hardware pulse counters (PCNT). A DS3231 RTC provides real-time clock and temperature over I2C; the current time is displayed on the Data screen. An SD card (FAT32, 1-wire SDIO) logs all sensor data to CSV every 1 second. A gauges controller task updates the Gauges and Data screens every 1 second. Non-critical startup errors are collected and displayed on the Main Menu screen.

## Files

- `IMPLEMENTED_ITEMS.md`: Complete implementation inventory -- hardware, BSP modules, UI, controllers, data logger, and current gaps.
- `USAGE_GUIDE.md`: How to build, flash, run, calibrate, and extend the project.
- `LVGL_ELEMENTS.md`: LVGL screen/widget inventory, runtime update details, and usage examples.

## Source Layout

```
main/                   Application code
  main.c                Entry point and hardware init sequence
  gauges_controller.c   1-second UI update task
  sensor.c              INA219 voltage/ampere with 2-point calibration
  pulse_controller.c    Flow rate and RPM from PCNT
  data_logger.c         CSV data logging to SD card (1s interval)
  include/              Headers for all application modules
  ui/                   SquareLine Studio generated LVGL screens

peripheral/             Board support packages
  bsp_i2c/              I2C master bus driver
  bsp_display/          GT911 touch driver
  bsp_illuminate/       Display (MIPI DSI + LVGL) and backlight
  bsp_extra/            GPIO48 LED control
  bsp_ina219/           INA219 current/power monitor
  bsp_pcnt/             Hardware pulse counter
  bsp_ds3231/           DS3231 RTC
  bsp_sd/               SD card (FAT32)
```
